name: Three Club Ladder

setup.description: Pick three targets at increasing distances within your iron range -- short, mid, and long. Hit 3 balls to each, using the club that matches.

rules.description: Play 3 balls at each distance, working from short to long. Switch clubs as the distance increases.
scoring: 1 point per ball that finishes on the green

caption: Three distances, three clubs, one routine to repeat nine times. #golfable #golftok #golfpractice #loweryourhandicap
